subcodes.first_line: This mention is from Us unto him who hath drawn nigh unto the Most Great Ocean and hath drunk therefrom, through My Name, the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تقرب الی البحر الاعظم و شرب منه باسمی العزیز الوهاب انا نجزی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @chastisement and requital
